steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says the father was "trying to find me among some other people," which shows he is looking for the narrator in a crowd.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content:
Substitute each choice: his father was trying to ______ me among some other people.

A) Discredit — "discredit" means to damage someone's reputation. A father searching at a station is not trying to undermine his returning son. Eliminate.

B) Reveal — "reveal" means to expose or disclose something hidden. The father isn't trying to expose the narrator; he's searching through a crowd. Eliminate.

C) Affect — "affect" means to have an impact on. This creates no meaningful sense in the context of scanning a crowd at a station. Eliminate.

D) Locate — "locate" means to find the position of. The father is scanning a crowd trying to spot his son — exactly locating him. Keep.

D is correct.
